nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 马代拉河
nodes.summary: 马代拉河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联55种鸟类，包括Red-throated piping guan、绿尾金喉蜂鸟、Pale-winged trumpeter等55种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Striated antbird
nodes.summary: Striated antbird（Striated antbird，学名 Drymophila devillei），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联6个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 亞馬遜盆地
nodes.summary: 亞馬遜盆地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联130种鸟类，包括灰穴䳍、小嘴穴䳍、绿翅雁等130种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 馬莫雷河
nodes.summary: 馬莫雷河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Crimson-bellied parakeet、Striated antbird、Pearly-breasted conebill，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 聖克魯斯省 (玻利維亞)
nodes.summary: 聖克魯斯省 (玻利維亞)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联51种鸟类，包括Red-throated piping guan、斑耳冠蜂鸟、紫辉尾蜂鸟等51种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 科恰班巴省
nodes.summary: 科恰班巴省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联41种鸟类，包括紫额辉蜂鸟、辉喉领蜂鸟、绿带尾蜂鸟等41种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It separately occurs in a larger area from southeastern Peru south into Bolivia as far as Cochabamba Department and east into Brazil to the Rio Madeira

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It separately occurs in a larger area from southeastern Peru south into Bolivia as far as Cochabamba Department and east into Brazil to the Rio Madeira

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: subochracea is found in Brazil south of the Amazon and east of the rios Madeira and Mamoré south into northeastern Bolivia's Santa Cruz Department

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: subochracea is found in Brazil south of the Amazon and east of the rios Madeira and Mamoré south into northeastern Bolivia's Santa Cruz Department

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species inhabits the understorey of humid evergreen forest where it is almost entirely found in stands of Guadua bamboo

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The striated antbird has one large continuous range in the Amazon Basin's southwest as well as the south-central area in the countries of southeastern Peru, northwestern Bolivia and Brazil

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered rare in Colombia and Ecuador and locally fairly common in Peru. "Human activity has little direct effect on the Striated Antbird, other than the local effects of habitat destruction."
